title: reel:edit-qte args
description: Add / update / remove a QTE cue (限时点按节奏点) on a scene. op='add' creates a cue (shape+appearAt+targetAt required; returns new id; if the scene has no qte block yet it is created with sensible default windows/scores). op='update' patches a cue by id. op='remove' deletes a cue by id. Times are ms relative to scene start. Call reel:get-scene-timeline first for ids.

shape.description: Cue type. Required for add. hold/sweep need durationMs/sweepDir.

appearAt.description: When the prompt appears (ms). Required for add.

targetAt.description: Ideal hit time (ms). Required for add; must be >= appearAt.
